label: Salone di Parrucchiere

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Extreme close-up, Italian woman hairdresser in her 40s, hands in client's hair, exhausted expression. Paper appointment book on counter with three red crosses in a row. Phone vibrating on counter, she cannot answer. Warm salon interior, mirrors, morning light through window. Handheld documentary feel, slow subtle push-in, shallow depth of field, desaturated cool tones, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Slow motion, Italian hairdresser pouring mixed hair color down the sink drain. Amber-red color flowing like money down the drain. Then: phone ringing on salon counter, no one answering. Warm but melancholic light, shallow DOF, intimate close-up, documentary style, desaturated, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Ventotto clienti su cento non si presentano. Colore gia preparato. Poltrona vuota. Ottanta euro buttati. E Treatwell prende il venticinque percento su quelli nuovi.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of empty salon chair with draped cape, morning light casting long shadows. Phone screen showing 5 missed calls. Stark, cold lighting, high contrast, still camera, heavy atmosphere, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same Italian woman hairdresser, now focused and confident, applying color with perfect technique. Phone on counter shows notification 'Sara ha confermato 3 appuntamenti'. She smiles at the mirror. Client in chair smiling too. Adjacent chair is occupied. Warm golden light, saturated warm tones, smooth slow dolly, hopeful atmosphere, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, Sara risponde al telefono da sola. Conosce la formula colore di ogni cliente, il patch test, le allergie. Manda il promemoria. Il cliente si ricorda. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial, happy commercial actors
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, shallow depth of field, authentic Italian salon, documentary realism

music_gen_config.genre_hint: modern trendy, electronic beats with piano, fashion-forward, warm

prompts.tense: tense minimal background, low synth pad, sparse piano notes, uneasy, minor key, 80bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: uplifting modern commercial, bright piano melody, warm electronic beats, optimistic, major key, 110bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], gestisci un salone?
Treatwell prende il 25% su ogni cliente nuovo che ti porta.
Noi zero. €497 una volta.
[VIDEO]
